title: The B1 Gauntlet
description: A mixed intermediate-level challenge that blends the whole B1 band — the present perfect, the past continuous, conditionals, modals of obligation and advice, and relative clauses — across the grammar, vocabulary, reading and spelling strands, climbing from a gentle warm-up to a final elite trial.
sources: CEFR B1 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Raymond Murphy, English Grammar in Use (present perfect, past continuous, conditionals, modals, relative clauses)
